title: Fix hook toolNames to match VS Code
description: Update `toolNames` arrays in `.github/hooks/policy-enforcement.json` to use actual VS Code tool IDs. Currently the block-git-add-all hook lists `["run_in_terminal", "execute/runInTerminal"]`. Verify `run_in_terminal` is the correct VS Code tool ID and remove any namespaced tool IDs that do not correspond to actual tools. Check all hooks in the file and verify every `toolNames` entry matches a real tool.
acceptance_criteria: Given `.github/hooks/policy-enforcement.json`, when I inspect all `toolNames` arrays, then every entry matches an actual VS Code Copilot tool ID
Given the block-git-add-all hook, when I trigger a git add . command, then the hook fires and blocks it
Given all hooks, when I inspect the file, then no invalid or namespaced tool IDs remain unless they are verified valid
